subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Upon thee be the peace of God and His glory. From every quarter have appeared the manifestations of rancor and the daysprings of hatred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله علیک سلام الله و شانه از هر شطری مظاهر ضغینه و مطالع بغضاء ظاهر مع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @prayer for governments and rulers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
